headings.text: PET or polyester is a semi-crystalline resin that provides a natural high gloss finish, dimensional stability, and UV resistance
Using High-Performance PEEK, PEI Plastics for Machining, Molding
Selecting the Right Plastic for Your Next Molded Part
Material Alternatives for Plastic Injection Molding

images.alt: Selecting the Right Plastic for Your Next Molded Part

meta_description: PET is a UV-resistant polymer with a well-rounded thermal, mechanical, and chemical properties. The thermoplastic material is well-suited for electrical applications. Rynite also flows well into the mold so it can more easily fill thin walls and complex features.

sections.heading: PET Injection Molding
sections.text: PET Injection Molding PET or polyester is a semi-crystalline resin that provides a natural high gloss finish, dimensional stability, and UV resistance Get a Quote

sections.heading: Injection Molding PET Material Properties
sections.text: Injection Molding PET Material Properties Tensile Modulus Tensile Stress (Break) Flexural Modulus Rockwell Hardness (R-Scale) Melting Point Data Sheet Test Method ISO 527 ISO 527 ISO 178 ISO 20390 ISO 11357 Rynite 530 (30% Glass Filled) 11,000 MPa 158 MPa 8,950 MPa 120 252°C VIEW PDF Rynite 935 (35% Glass Filled) 10,200 MPa 85.0 MPa 9,100 MPa 115 252°C VIEW PDF

sections.heading: Grab a Design Cube
sections.text: Grab a Design Cube Want to learn more about injection molding? Sign up to receive a Design Cube. This physical aid demonstrates how to properly design features commonly found on molded parts. GET DESIGN CUBE

sections.heading: PET Injection Molding Applications
sections.text: PET Injection Molding Applications The material properties of Rynite PET make it an ideal options for components in electrical applications, consumer products, and automotive. PET is often used for the following parts: Plastic components in electrical products Electrical encapsulation or insulation Electrical insulation polymers Connectors for electrical Packaging or containers for consumables and food Appliances
